purpose: Extend Private v2 tiny-vs-base bakeoff with a filler-heavy edge fixture after setup-harness fixes.

codeUnderTest.note: Branch used only for proof. It was not merged to main.

fixture.truth: Well, I mean, you know, it is what it is.

tiny.transcript: Well, I mean, you know, it is what it is.
tiny.detailTranscript: Well, I mean, you know, it is what it is.

base.transcript: I mean, you know, it is what it is.
base.detailTranscript: I mean, you know, it is what it is.

deltas.baseOmission: Dropped the opening word/filler-adjacent discourse marker: Well.

result.recommendationImpact: Strengthens the existing recommendation not to default whisper-base.en for Private release. On this filler-heavy edge fixture, tiny is both more accurate and substantially faster.
remainingGaps: Names/acronyms fixture still not covered by the current corpus runner.
Noisy/low-volume and near-silence fixtures still need either runner support or a separate probe.
